programme.desc: Geneticists around the city are dying from what looks like vampire bites. The case falls to pretty-boy Benten. Soon, Benten finds out all three victims had something in common far more sinister than death by bloodsucker.

programme.title: Cyber City Oedo 808
programme.desc: A mysterious hacker has taken over an AI-controlled office building and turned its security systems against the people inside. Sengoku is forced to try and save the hostages and find the hacker - or die trying.

programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.desc: Sesshomaru wields the Tetsusaiga with his borrowed arm against Inuyasha, who fights back with his scabbard.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome has her sacred jewel shards taken away from her and is returned to the present day, unable to return to feudal Japan.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go joins the Pineapple Grand Prix, a series of grueling courses. In honor of the legend that originated the race, racers are obligated to carry pineapples during the race. Then, it turns out that one of the pineapples has a stolen jewel inside.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: On the way to an evil mountain where monsters are said to dwell, Go chases a weird tank appeared in the jungle and finds a secret base at a lake.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.desc: Go escapes from a trap set by an assassin gang and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With help from Polnareff as well as putting his own life on the line, Jotaro is finally able to land a blow on DIO. Finding the shriveled body of Joseph Joestar, Jotaro becomes enraged and wages his final, desperate battle with DIO!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Jotaro Kujo! Meets Josuke Higashikata
programme.desc: In April 1999, Jotaro Kujo travels to a town in Japan called Morioh to find a young man named Josuke Higashikata, the secret love child of his grandfather, Joseph Joestar. Upon finding him, Jotaro is surprised to learn that Josuke also possesses a Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Josuke Higashikata! Meets Angelo

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey take their classic car to an auction in Merseyside. Christina detours to learn about the history of the British seaside in Bognor Regis and Mark visits the last surviving Victorian Brickworks in Britain.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey's antiquing adventure continues in the Cotswolds. Mark discovers a rural idyll that inspired a best seller novel while Christina learns about an incredible war hero.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Cheshire, Christina Trevanion ends up deep underground and Mark Stacey finds himself in such a predicament he has to call for help! Mark finds a Home Guard practice rifle while Christina makes a peculiar purchase of a human jaw.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey travel in the West Midlands in their classic car. Mark visits the factory that profited from the Victorian obsession with death. Christina learns why the original Land Rover became a global phenomenon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish! Just twenty pounds separates Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey. Mark is literally stuck and struggling waist-deep in antiques. Christina moves into property and buys a rather unique home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw visit the West Coast of Scotland. Military buff Paul gets excited when he finds some desk ink stamps dating from the Cold War. Natasha ends up on ice as she gets to grips with an ancient sport in Ayrshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Cumbria is the destination for Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw and their classic Mercedes. Natasha visits a mint cake factory while Paul discovers an intriguing side to Cumbria's wartime past.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw are in historic York. Paul struggles to find anything he likes before plumping to buy a haul of agricultural salvage. And Natasha's eyes are turned by some spindles on a rocking chair.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw are taking their classic car around Norfolk and Suffolk. Paul finds himself as captain of a rare and valuable boat on the Norfolk Broads while Natasha ends up in Thetford woods looking for bunnies.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Natasha Raskin are antiquing in Norfolk and there's one last auction in Diss. It's the final 'Round Britain Rummage' and they unearth a rarely seen art nouveau food warmer and a charming 19th-century table croquet set.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The West Country beckons James Braxton and Raj Bisram. Kicking off in Bath, they motor through Bristol and Hungerford before boarding the Isle of Wight ferry. Both believe an island auction will attract bidders looking for nautical fare.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and James Braxton are on a buying spree on the Isle of Wight. James has a conversation with a man he believes is Elton John while Raj falls for a teddy and a ride on doggy. Only a few pounds separate the experts!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a shopping spree through Somerset that ends at an auction in Woking. James thinks a pair of Staffordshire figures will attract big bids, despite some damage. Raj hopes the bidders will appreciate his experimental Moorcroft vase.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram are in the beautiful New Forest. James dives into buying in the village of Brockenhurst, but all bets are off when Raj catches up with him in the market town of Ringwood.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Tenby and its idyllic crescent-shaped harbor - nestled in southwest Wales within the Pembrokeshire Coast National Park.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces the Roadshow from Warwick Castle which overlooks Warwick town.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Chichester Cathedral. Finds include a fine cow creamer, a rare 18th-century games purse, and a valuable necklace found in an attic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Shugborough Hall, the experts examine a rare posset pot, a ceramic garden seat, an 18th-century chest, and a corset with a poetic message.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael presents from Ramsgate in Kent where the experts examine two special teddy bears and a handbag made from an armadillo shell.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Vance asigna a McGee, Torres y Bishop el cumplimiento de las medidas de protección frente al COVID en una cumbre de asuntos exteriores, donde descubren un vínculo con un caso de asesinato de otro equipo del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La evidencia del apuñalamiento de un sargento de la Marina lleva a Torres a conocer a su padre, Miguel (Steven Bauer), quien le abandonó cuando era un niño.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un ciclista atropellado por un automóvil que se dio a la fuga, Gibbs se prepara para testificar en contra de un asesor financiero quien le robó millones de dólares a la Fuerza Naval.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Imprudente
programme.desc: Frank debe descubrir la verdad cuando un agente encubierto acusa a un compañero de brutalidad policial. Además, Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un famoso fotógrafo acusado recientemente de agresión por sus antiguas modelos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Niebla de guerra
programme.desc: Danny y Baez trabajan con el Ranger de Texas Waylon Gates (Lyle Lovett) cuando les encargan un caso para encontrar al Asesino de la Estrella Solitaria.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Intereses personales
programme.desc: Jamie está siendo investigado después de que su chaleco de policía sea encontrado en un delincuente, y Frank se debate entre ayudar y proteger a un viejo amigo, Chuck Kennedy (Ed Asner), cuya casa ha sido invadida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los primeros 100 días
programme.desc: Frank y Garrett idean un plan para convencer al alcalde Chase de que colabore mejor con los demás para dirigir correctamente la ciudad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un ciclista atropellado por un automóvil que se dio a la fuga, Gibbs se prepara para testificar en contra de un asesor financiero quien le robó millones de dólares a la Fuerza Naval.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: After healthy input from her roommates, Mattie makes a decision regarding her relationship with DJ. Feeling like she's missing out, Hannah invites her boyfriend Cody to the house so she can get some lovin' too.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets a shocking text from Santana. The gang goes ghost hunting and may bring home more than they bargained for. Mattie has to choose between her roommates and her family back home.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Wild Lyle returns in full force when the gang decides to take a weekend vacay to a NASCAR race. But after some unexpected news about Santana, Lyle goes off the deep end and lands in an ambulance, rushing to the hospital.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: As Lyle spends time in the hospital, Mattie gives Santana a piece of her mind. Lauren flips her lid and the whole kitchen pays for it. But she's got something extra special in mind for Walt. When Murray's friend comes to visit, things get hog wild.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle Officially breaks it off with Santana over the phone. The crew bets on their Segway race, boys versus girls. The losers must become their opponents' servants for a day. A newly-single Lyle rekindles old desires in Mattie.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Bubba surprises Tiffany with an unexpected visit, but, Tiffany isn't sure how things will go after their recent arguments. After being rejected by numerous men at the bar, Hurricane Martha threatens the shores of Savannah.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast says goodbye to Savannah and to each other for the last time. Old wounds open up between Tiffany and Bubba. Santana attempts to win back Lyle. The crew buries a time capsule in the backyard.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Nothing is off-limits as the Party Down South Crew gets together one last time to share their favorite memories and relive their wildest moments from all five vacations together.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Samantha Busch hits the catwalk and Amber Balcaen raises eyebrows as the women attend a charity event.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Amber puts her relationship with Samantha in jeopardy, and Mariel feels less than welcome at Ashley's dinner party.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whiney is torn between her friendships with the wives and Mariel, Amber struggles with her long-distance relationship, and Samantha and Kyle discuss baby number two.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel's feud escalates, while Samantha surprises a couple on behalf of her foundation.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel reconcile their friendship, Mariel finds a wedding venue, Samantha worries about her reproductive health, and Amber pushes forward with her racing career.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: The ladies head to Daytona for one of the most dangerous races of the season, and Amber struggles to land a sponsor.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Hostilities are renewed when Whitney and Mariel snub Ashley's invite to Kurt's birthday party, and Samantha helps Amber prepare for her big race at Hickory Motor Speedway.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Kyle helps Amber improve her lap time on the track, signaling to Samantha that she's ready for the big leagues, and Whitney tries to apologize for missing Kurt's birthday.

programme.title: United Shades of America

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/22/2016. What’s it like living off the grid? W. Kamau Bell travels to North Carolina and Tennessee to see what it takes.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/29/2016. Kamau visits people in Portland, Oregon, to discover how hipsters and gentrification have affected their neighborhoods.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
programme.desc: Dick Van Dyke interpreta a un excéntrico inventor que crea un extraordinario coche que conduce por tierra, mar y aire, y que le lleva con sus hijos y su novia (Sally Ann Howes) a un mundo mágico de aventuras sin fin. ¡Un clásico para la familia!

programme.title: El primer gran robo al tren
programme.desc: Durante el siglo XIX, tres hombres conspiran para realizar el robo de un tren que lleva una fortuna. Sean Connery, Lesley-Anne Down, Donald Sutherland, Alan Webb, Robert Lang.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Pistoleros malditos
programme.desc: En esta película, que acaba con los mitos sobre el infame tiroteo de Corral, Stacy Keach interpreta a Doc Holliday, quien se alía con el mariscal Wyatt Earp (Harris Yulin) para desarmar una banda de delincuentes.

programme.title: El grito de la muerte
programme.desc: Dos amigos se ven involucrados en una aventura al investigar sobre una figura de piedra que fue desenterrada, y a cuyo fantasma de la creadora han visto llorando.

programme.title: Jóvenes y bellas
programme.desc: Un grupo de padres decide mandar a sus hijas a un campamento para alejarlas de la música rock, pero ahí ocurre lo que todo progenitor teme: sus pequeñas encuentran novio.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: Guerra de razas
programme.desc: Inspirado en hechos reales. Para evitar que terroristas nacionales construyan una bomba sucia, un agente del FBI (Daniel Radcliffe) se infiltra en un grupo extremista, haciéndose pasar por uno de ellos.

programme.title: La Trampa
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar, Adrien Brody, Antonio Banderas y John Malkovich protagonizan esta atrapante y explosiva historia policial sobre tres criminales atrapados en un depósito tras un asalto.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: A espaldas de la ley
programme.desc: Cuando el agente de policía Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) descubre que su amigo de la infancia es el principal sospechoso en un caso de asesinato, él es el único que piensa que le tendieron una trampa para proteger el negocio turístico local.

programme.title: Los Intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Tierra de sueños
programme.desc: Un joven se encuentra en un dilema, cuando descubre a una ladrona de bancos escondiéndose en su pequeña aldea; entre reclamar la recompensa por su cabeza y su creciente atracción por la seductora delincuente.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: Sólo una noche
programme.desc: La historia de un matrimonio que se enfrenta a la tentación que puede decidir su futuro cuando se encuentran separados durante una sola noche.

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: El último beso
programme.desc: El último beso es una película de drama y comedia sobre la vida, el amor, la infidelidad, el perdón, el matrimonio y la amistad... y la aceptación de cumplir 30.

programme.title: Persiguiendo un sueño
programme.desc: Decidido a reconstruir su familia después de que su madre drogadicta sale de prisión, Rey (Taylor Lautner) secuestra a su hermano menor y escapa de su hogar en el desierto hacia la costa de California.

programme.title: Una boda complicada
programme.desc: Meg y Tyler nunca se llevaron bien entre sí, pero pronto tendrán que trabajar juntos para salvar el casamiento de sus mejores amigos. Ellos se darán cuenta de que hacen un buen equipo y que quizá hay lugar en este casamiento para un poco de romance.

programme.title: La dulce vida
programme.desc: Poppy es una maestra de escuela del norte de Londres, que con su optimismo, supera los pequeños dramas de la vida y contagia de alegría a quienes la rodean.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir 18 años por matar a un hombre en un duelo, un hombre regresa a su ciudad natal decidido a llevar una vida normal, pero los hijos del hombre al que mató están empeñados en vengarse.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: El Inca (LAS)
programme.desc: Una trágica historia de amor basada en la vida del dos veces campeón mundial de boxeo venezolano Edwin "el Inca" Valero.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Open Water (2004) (LAS)
programme.desc: A couple are left stranded in shark infested waters while on vacation.

programme.title: Muerte en la montaña
programme.desc: Un día típico en las laderas se convierte en una escalofriante pesadilla para tres amigos que se disponen a esquiar en la nieve cuando se quedan varados en la telesilla antes de su última bajada.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Un crucero de locura
programme.desc: Un joven comediante en apuros toma un trabajo simple en un crucero, donde espera tener su gran oportunidad para triunfar en el mundo de la comedia en cruceros.

programme.title: Salto de fé
programme.desc: Steve Martin interpreta al reverendo Jonas Nightengale, un hombre tramposo que viaja de ciudad en ciudad convenciendo a personas descarriadas y viviendo de sus donativos.

programme.title: Dinero fácil
programme.desc: Monty Capuletti (Rodney Dangerfield) bebe, fuma, juega, y come demasiado. Pero cuando su suegra le deja una herencia considerable, solo hay un inconveniente: según el testamento, él debe convertir sus vicios en virtudes antes de poder cobrar.

programme.title: Súper bomberos
programme.desc: Sin tener las cualidades necesarias, un grupo de individuos acude al llamado de la ciudad que solicita nuevos integrantes para formar parte de un escuadrón élite de bomberos.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.desc: To help the Allied invasion at Normandy,Hogan convinces the Germans that Klink has been promoted to Chief of Staff.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: General Burkhalter comes to Stalag 13 determined to marry off his sister to Klink. Hogan has to find a planted German agent in the Underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tempts a Swedish scientist to defect.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: When a lovely, young and successful farmer comes to Oliver (Eddie Albert) for his legal counsel, Lisa (Eva Gabor) quickly becomes jealous of the two spending time together and becomes determined to break up what she sees as a budding romance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Monroe Brothers show up to fix the Douglas's closet, Lisa learns that Ralph is devastated because her true love has stood her up on another date. Lisa's solution: an intensive, two-day beauty treatment for Ralph…and the barn for Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the real-life story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Rob fears he is no longer needed when his co-writers do a show without his help.

programme.desc: Rob invites 44 fellow PTA members to his television show but forgets all about it until air time.

programme.desc: Rob recalls the hilarious events leading up to Ritchie's birth when Ritchie asks the inevitable question.

programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer fue brutalmente asesinada en su casa y los únicos testigos del crimen fueron los perros de la familia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bomba, construida para poder causar tanto daño como sea posible, mata a la víctima con una fuerza y llama mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ataque biológico
programme.desc: El Ataque bio terrorista de Rajneeshee en 1984: los investigadores descubren un complot para derrocar al gobierno después de que una cepa única de salmonela enfermara a la gente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de la esposa de un prominente banquero llevó a la policía a una persecución inútil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week nine of training camp intensifies when Kelli and Judy confront Alora-Rose and deliberate squad dismissal decisions one week before the first game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds will audition but only 45 girls will secure a spot in the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp. DCC director Kelli Finglass presides over the process with a keen eye for talent and beauty.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp gets underway as the girls are introduced to a grueling schedule of dance rehearsals with choreographer Judy Trammell and fitness instructor Jay Johnson.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Making it this far is one thing - enduring Training Camp is another. The hopeful group of 43 is far from the final squad, and DCC Director Kelli Finglass quickly reminds them that there will be cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates don't know what hit them when tough as nails and brutally honest guest choreographer Kitty Carter teaches a class. Then, the rookies get one step closer to transforming into Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies get to wear the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders uniform for the very first time during a professional modeling shoot. Then the girls have a life-changing experience skydiving with the legendary Army parachute team, the Golden Knights!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC training camp comes down to the last grueling rehearsals and whose long legs fit into the famous kick-line. The cheerleaders attend a bikini boot-camp for last-minute toning. Then, amid tears of disappointment and shock, Kelli makes the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Over 600 excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the finals audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp begins! The newly elected training camp candidates are excited, even star-struck, as they meet the veterans for the first time at Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman claims to have been abducted from her multimillion-dollar home, leaving more than 150 investigators to search for her.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A dancer is murdered in her Virginia home; after interviewing a series of suspects, detectives realize the case is much more complicated than previously thought.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An investigation of a woman found murdered in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman finds herself on the wrong side of the law after she accuses her boyfriend of rape.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators look for answers when a popular school superintendent is found dead in his western New York home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Nebraska family's parents are murdered following the clan's Easter celebration.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman claims to have been abducted from her multimillion-dollar home, leaving more than 150 investigators to search for her.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The family members of murdered California entrepreneur Chris Smith speak out; interviews with investigators, Smith's former colleague, and prosecutor Matt Murphy.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Eleven years after Connecticut mother Donna Palomba is raped in her home, investigators finally track down her attacker; Donna speaks out about the latest developments in the case, including her fight to keep her assailant from walking free.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers investigate a string of deadly shootings targeting women in the border city of Laredo, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After teenagers Rachel Shoaf and Sheila Eddy are convicted of murdering their 16-year-old friend, Skylar Neese, Skylar's parents discuss the night she disappeared; Rachel Shoaf's therapist, Patricia Bailey, shares her thoughts.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: I Love New York: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30-minute special episode, NY hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite guys from the series.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK

programme.title: Wife Swap UK

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: A compelling and heart-warming swap as Deirdre from Leeds and Margaret from Wolverhampton trade places for two weeks.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: The Doctor realises the freighter is now a huge bomb, with one passenger still aboard....

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: The crew of Nerva has fallen victim to a space plague.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: Sarah is a victim of the plague and the only cure is to transmat her down to Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: On the Moon, the Doctor is captured by the Ice Warriors and learns that they intend to use T-Mat to spread a deadly fungus across the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: An Ice Warrior invasion fleet is on its way to the Moon. Back on Earth, the Doctor devises a plan to destroy the Martian fungus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: Returning to the Moonbase, the Doctor confronts Slaar and the remaining Ice Warriors and must find a way of deflecting the invasion fleet that is heading towards them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in a bleak future where Earth is ruled by the Daleks and mankind is enslaved. Rescuing Jo, the two escape but the brutish Ogrons are in pursuit.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Controller betrays the Daleks and is exterminated. The Daleks travel back in time to the 20th Century to ensure that the peace conference fails.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: Renegade Daleks battle Imperial Daleks for control of the Hand of Omega and Ace takes them on single-handedly at Coal Hill School, while Ratcliffe makes his move.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the difference between the two Dalek factions and why they want a stellar manipulator. He hopes Captain Gilmore's people are up to the task ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The streets of East London shake under a civil war bering fought between the Daleks, as the Doctor forces the Dalek Emperor to reveal himself to be Davros, waging one last battle.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: Ian and Vicki are trapped by tentacled creatures on the planet Aridius. The Doctor and Barbara witness Daleks leaving Skaro on a mission to eliminate the Doctor and his companions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Doctor and his friends have been given shelter from the Daleks by the Aridians. But the Daleks threaten to kill the Aridians unless they hand over the time travellers.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Daleks pursue the TARDIS through time and space. In an attempt to lose the Daleks, the Doctor makes a stop on the top of the Empire State Building and then on a sailing ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: With the Daleks in pursuit, the TARDIS lands in what appears to be a haunted house. When the Daleks arrive, the travellers depart, not realising that they have left Vicki behind!

programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons who are in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Johnstone family meets a three different rescue dogs, but can only pick one to give all of their love. Will it be JJ- a Maltese mix, Marley- a Labrador Retriever, or Ruby- a German Shepherd mix?

programme.title: Scotland From The Sky

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time, the younger cheetah cubs are finally playing outside and Emily already feels that some of them seem more suited than others to become cheetah ambassadors.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400km, and cover an incredible range of climates. Winter in the central and northern islands can be savage, but summer in the sweltering southern islands couldn't be more different.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: The safari continues at Kavinga where Kristina and Andy have more interactions with Juno, the resident lion king. A late drive leads them to the predators of the night.

programme.title: CLYDESDALE: SAVING THE GREATEST HORSE
programme.desc: The Clydesdale horse - famed for its white-feathered feet and for hauling Budweiser beer – is in danger of dying out.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina visits Thetford Estate where she's treated to amazing photographic opportunities for her personal calendar.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom Hunt goes in search of a unique human, Eskil Ronningsbakken capable of balancing on the edge of the 100 metre vertical drop of the Puento Nuevo Bridge.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar is instantly taken by the physical beauty and cleanliness of the country. He meets a netball team of fa'afafine's (men who live as women) who perform a drag show at night.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Craig joins Kristina at Sango Lodge in the heart of the Save Valley Conservancy where they explore the vast, rugged wilderness. Kristina joins Byrce Clemence and his anti-poaching team as they demonstrate the effectiveness of the anti-poaching dog unit.

programme.title: Africa: The Serengeti
programme.desc: Chronicles a spectacle that few humans have ever witnessed, the Great Migration, taking viewers on a journey with over 1.5 million animals as they travel more than 500 miles across the Serengeti plains in Tanzania and Kenya.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina is back with Sean and hosted at the Hide Safari Camp in Hwange National Park at their driest period. A night drive leads them to a unique finding.

programme.title: Scotland From The Sky
programme.desc: In the last episode of the landmark series, Scotland From The Sky explores how aerial photography has revealed Scotland's hidden ancient past and uncovered secrets buried right beneath our feet.

programme.title: Plastic: The Real Sea Monster
programme.desc: Plastic floats. This is where our story begins. Millions of tons of plastic enter the ocean every year; from rivers and shores, ships, and platforms. The world's scientists have studied the phenomenon and come to alarming conclusions.

programme.title: Wild Uruguay
programme.desc: Uruguay's biodiversity is surprisingly greater than one would expect. We will find out why as we embark on a journey through its ecosystems and landscapes to discover its fauna.

programme.title: Animal Social Networks
programme.desc: Personality

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: Umbria, the ‘green heart of Italy’, the ‘wilder Tuscany’, is an area not hindered by grand centres of tourism. This is little Italy in its purest form. An attractive region of hills and mountains stuffed to bursting with hidden treasures.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girlfriends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, tired of the extensive visit by their cousin Tennessee Ernie, try to get rid of the likeable character by pleading poverty. Ernie then tries to help his gracious hosts out of their fiscal desperation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Golf pro, Jimmy Demaret, visits Lucy and Ethel on the green to show them how the game is really played after they're misled by Ricky and Fred. Lucy and Ethel decide they'll learn how to play golf to spend more time with their husbands.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ben Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment, Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders, Ricky is a candidate for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
